positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for positive
% SZS output start Proof for positive
1. netflix_show(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
2. popular(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : ((netflix_show(X0) & popular(X0)) => binge_watch(karen,X0)) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0] : ((netflix_show(X0) & binge_watch(karen,X0)) => share(karen,lisa,X0)) [input(axiom)]
8. share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [negated conjecture 8]
10. ~share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [flattening 9]
11. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(karen,X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 4]
12. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)) [flattening 11]
14. ! [X0] : (share(karen,lisa,X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0))) [ennf transformation 7]
15. ! [X0] : (share(karen,lisa,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0)) [flattening 14]
17. netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
18. popular(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 2]
20. binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
24. share(karen,lisa,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0) [cnf transformation 15]
25. ~share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [cnf transformation 10]
32. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~binge_watch(karen,stranger_things) [resolution 24,25]
33. ~binge_watch(karen,stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 32,17]
34. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~popular(stranger_things) [resolution 33,20]
35. ~popular(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 34,17]
36. $false [forward subsumption resolution 35,18]
% SZS output end Proof for positive
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:

cnf(u23,axiom,

    download(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~download(karen,X0) | binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    netflix_show(stranger_things)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~popular(black_mirror)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    netflix_show(black_mirror)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    popular(stranger_things)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~binge_watch(karen,X0) | download(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define share(X0,X1,X2) := $true
